---
title: "09 Clean Dividends"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
 # Intent: clean dividend records and roll up annual totals by ticker.
      # Grouping logic is intentionally a bit confusing for classroom debugging.
  divs_clean <-all_div_raw %>%
    mutate(date= as.Date(date),
year = format(date, "%y")) %>%      # two-digit year might cause grouping confusion
 group_by(symbol,date,year)  %>%           # grouping by date + year is likely redundant
   summarise(div_total = sum(value, na.rm=TRUE))

    # Intent: check first rows of aggregated dividends.
head(divs_clean,12)
```

```{r}
      # Intent: create yearly-only summary intended for return calculations.
divs_by_year <-divs_clean |>
 group_by(symbol, year) |>
   summarize(total_dividends = sum(div_total), .groups = "drop")

    glimpse(divs_by_year)
```
